caption: The video features a man performing on stage, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a decorative red and black pattern on the chest, paired with a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems engaged, with their heads turned towards the performer. The atmosphere conveys a sense of live music performance, possibly a folk or traditional genre, given the attire and instrument. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the event or organization associated with the performance.
